project_type: Full-stack VPN panel: Go API backend + Vue 3 admin SPA + Vue 3 portal SPA
build_system: npm/vite for frontend, go build for backend
test_framework: vitest for frontend (with happy-dom), go test for backend
build_command: cd panel/web/admin && npm install && npx vue-tsc --noEmit && npx vite build
verification_instructions: 1. Run vue-tsc --noEmit to type-check admin frontend. 2. Run vite build to confirm bundle compiles. 3. Run go build ./... from repo root. 4. Run go test ./... from repo root.
environment_constraints: No docker daemon available. Network is available for npm install. Go toolchain available.
contribution_requirements: Branch is audit/debug-cleanup-improvements. User wants changes pushed directly or new PR. Code should be update-friendly (non-breaking, clean).
key_patterns: Vue 3 Composition API with <script setup>. Pinia stores with composition style. KorisUI shared components (@koris/ui/*). useApi composable for HTTP. useCommandPalette composable for Ctrl+K. WebSocket realtime via gorilla/websocket with 3-second stat polling. Backend uses net/http with manual route registration on ServeMux.
directory_structure: panel/ is the root. panel/panel/internal/api/ has Go backend. panel/panel/web/admin/src/ is Vue 3 admin SPA. panel/panel/web/portal/src/ is Vue 3 customer portal. panel/panel/web/shared/ has KorisUI shared components.
